hindi: ॐ क्रीं काल्यै नमः। ॐ क्रीं महाकाल्यै नमः।
english: Om Kreem, salutations to Kali. Om Kreem, salutations to Mahakali
roman: Om Kreem Kalyai namah. Om Kreem Mahakalyai namah

hindi: ॐ क्रीं कपालिन्यै नमः। ॐ क्रीं कमलासनायै नमः।
english: Om Kreem, salutations to Kapalini. Om Kreem, salutations to the lotus-seated one
roman: Om Kreem Kapalinyai namah. Om Kreem Kamalasanayai namah

english: Kalika, Kali, Kapardini, with a fierce face
Wearing a garland of bones, desirable, beautiful, endowed with all arts
She who faces south, worshipped from the south, moving southward, compassionate
The Goddess, destroyer of demons, destroyer of poverty
roman: Danava danava mathani daridhrya nasha karini

hindi: काली सहस्रनामानि पठेत् यः प्रत्यहं नरः।
english: Whoever reads the thousand names of Kali every day
roman: Kali sahasra namani pathet yah pratyaham narah

hindi: स याति परमां सिद्धिं काल्याः प्रसादतः शुभम्॥
english: Attains the supreme perfection by the auspicious grace of Kali
roman: Sa yati paramam siddhim Kalyah prasadatah shubham
